name: Carlotto, Estela de
source_notes:
Francisco Robledo cites a Facebook post by astrologer Carolina Goldsman, dated 22 October 2020, in which she provides a picture of herself with Carlotto above Carlotto's natal chart, and writes:
"Esta mujer cumple hoy 90 años. 
Estela de Carlotto es una líder, creadora y activista argentina para la vigencia efectiva de los Derechos Humanos. Presidenta de la asociación Abuelas de Plaza de Mayo.
Esta es una foto durante el paseo que hicimos por La Barra y Jose Ignacio en 2007, cuando la invite a participar del Festival de Cine en el que trabajaba.
Yo recién había renunciado al mundo de la Abogacía y me había venido a vivir a Uruguay.
Su presencia me dio fuerza para crear el gran cambio en mi vida, animarme a saltar y soltar, y ver que los Derechos Humanos no solamente se trabajan en el mundo del "Derecho".
Estela de Carlotto, gran persona, feliz cumpleaños!!!"
--------------------------------
(Translation: This woman is 90 years old today. Estela de Carlotto is an Argentinian leader, creator and activist for the effective validity of Human Rights. President of the association Grandmothers of Plaza de Mayo. This is a photo during the walk we did through La Barra and Jose Ignacio in 2007, when I invited her to participate in the Film Festival where I worked. I had just given up on the world of Law and had come to live in Uruguay. Her presence gave me strength to create the great change in my life, encourage me to jump and let go, and see that Human Rights are not only worked in the world of "Law". Estela de Carlotto, great person, happy birthday!!!).

We assume then that the time of birth came from Carlotto in person.
categories: Family : Relationship : Marriage more than 15 Yrs
